privileged_info_summary: The task involves adding a synthetic specialist record to Oscar EMR (an open-source clinical application running via Docker). Oscar EMR is configured with default credentials: username oscardoc, password oscar, PIN 1117. The specialist address (250 Dundas Street West, Mississauga, ON L5B 1J2) is a real location in Mississauga. The phone (905-555-0147) and fax (905-555-0148) use the 905 area code verified for Mississauga, Ontario, but employ the 555 exchange which is reserved by North American telecommunications standards for fictional use. The specialist data (name: Rajesh Patel, specialty: Orthopedic Surgery, email: referrals@patelortho.ca) is entirely synthetic and created for testing purposes.
